title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 52.030 - Bond in duplicate — where filed
text:
52.030.  Bond in duplicate — where filed. — Such bond shall be executed in duplicate; one part thereof shall be deposited and recorded in the office of the clerk of the county commission, and the other part shall be transmitted by the clerk to the director of revenue.
(RSMo 1939 § 11059, A.L. 1945 p. 1820) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9888; 1919 § 12880; 1909 § 11437
